item.title: JacobsBen: Ben Jacobs @JacobsBen · 1h Exclusive: Richard Hughes won't leave #LFC this summer and will lead a continued revamp, with
item.description:
Ben Jacobs @JacobsBen · 1h Exclusive: Richard Hughes won't leave #LFC this summer and will lead a continued revamp, with 3-4 senior players set to arrive.
Al-Hilal interest genuine, but FSG want Hughes to stay.
More on @talkSPORT shortly.
@alex_crook 94 226 1 mil 124 mil

item.title: JacobsBen: Ben Jacobs @JacobsBen · 2min En respuesta a @JacobsBen More here for @talkSPORT . De talksport.com 2 1 mil
item.description: Ben Jacobs @JacobsBen · 2min En respuesta a @JacobsBen More here for @talkSPORT . De talksport.com 2 1 mil

item.title: Arsenal: Arsenal @Arsenal · 15min Everyone at Arsenal is shocked and deeply saddened by the tragic passing of former goalkeeper,
item.description:
Arsenal @Arsenal · 15min Everyone at Arsenal is shocked and deeply saddened by the tragic passing of former goalkeeper, Alex Manninger.
All our thoughts are with his family and loved ones at this incredibly sad time.
Rest in peace, Alex 184 679 3 mil 38 mil

item.title: ManUtd: Manchester United @ManUtd · 4min En respuesta a @Arsenal Sending heartfelt condolences to Alex's family and everyone af
item.description: Manchester United @ManUtd · 4min En respuesta a @Arsenal Sending heartfelt condolences to Alex's family and everyone affected by this tragic news — our thoughts are with you 9 17 253 3 mil

item.title: TheAthleticFC: The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 4min Saudi Pro League club Al Hilal have been sold by the country’s Public Inve
item.description:
The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 4min Saudi Pro League club Al Hilal have been sold by the country’s Public Investment Fund (PIF).
PIF, the Saudi Arabian sovereign wealth fund, has sold a 70 per cent stake in Al Hilal to Kingdom Holding Company, the firm run by Prince Alwaleed Bin Talal, the billionaire businessman Mostrar más 2 4 25 3 mil
